Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Application-wide settings managed from the Admin Panel.

logoName.description: The name of the Lucide icon used as the logo.

reviewText.description: The text shown in the Application Review step.

creditReportButtonText.description: The text on the credit report button.

creditReportUrl.description: The destination URL for the credit report (may be cloaked).

blockBots.description: Block known bots from seeing the link.

requireInteraction.description: Require user interaction before revealing the link.

obfuscateUrl.description: Use advanced JS obfuscation for the URL.

footerText.description: The copyright text in the footer.

teamImage.description: The image URL for the team section.

teamImageSize.description: Size of the team image (small, medium, large).

teamTitle.description: The title text for the team section.

teamDescription.description: The description text for the team section.

logoSize.description: Size of the logo (small, medium, large).

bonusTitle.description: Title for the Recruitment Bonus section.

bonusDescription.description: Description for the Recruitment Bonus section.

telegramBotToken.description: The Telegram bot token for notifications.

telegramChatId.description: The Telegram chat ID for notifications.

updatedAt.description: The last time settings were updated.

Application.title: Application
Application.description: A job application submitted by a user.

scheduledCallTime.description: Persistent random call time within 3 days.

creditReportScreenshot.description: Base64 encoded screenshot of the credit report.

VisitorLog.title: Visitor Log
VisitorLog.description: Log of a visitor to the site.
